free_text: Neutron resonance parameters of 96Zr below 100 keV
Orela
ZrO2 sample,
enriched to 58.42% in 96Zr.
Sample thickness: 0.02055 atoms/B (48.65  B/atom),
0.01202 atoms/B (83.19 B/atom) for 96Zr.
78.203-m flight path.
Beam filters of 10B to eliminate overlap neutrons.
Corrected for dead time and background.
Absolute uncertainty
Data produced from J. Harvey files.
Resonance parameter data.
Compiler's comment, April 2012: The original
publication does not contain cross section
information, it contains resonance parameter
information that is compiled in EXFOR entry 30382 and
transmission data. A detailed analysis of J. Harvey
cross section data clearly shows that spectrum is
contaminated by Oxygen resonances and represents a
sum of Zr-96 and O-16 data. Per ENDF evaluators
request SF8=RAW was added to the reaction string.
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower
case. corrected according to last EXFOR rules and
Dict. BP: Reaction code was changed to RAW data per
ENDF evaluators request.
Run id: 7053
2-cm NE110 plastic scintillator.
